selection.rule: SHA256(frame) absent from both the baseline unique frames and the imported retained frames
selection.inventory_sha256_format: lowercase digest followed by LF, lexicographically sorted
selection.metadata_sha256_format: for each SHA256-sorted case: sha256 NUL decimal_size NUL expected_result NUL artifact_member LF
selection.frames_sha256_format: for each SHA256-sorted case: uint32_le(size) followed by frame bytes

derivation.inventory_format: lowercase digest followed by LF, lexicographically sorted
derivation.set_rule: selected case SHA256 set equals candidate minimized SHA256 set minus baseline unique SHA256 set minus imported retained SHA256 set
